query: ("weather forecast" OR "weather forecasts" OR "meteorological forecast" OR "meteorological forecasts" OR "heat forecast" OR "heat forecasts" OR "temperature forecast" OR "temperature forecasts" OR "early warning system" OR "early warning systems" OR "heat warning" OR "heat warnings" OR "heat alert" OR "heat alerts" OR "weather advisory" OR "weather advisories" OR "climate information" OR "forecast-based intervention" OR "forecast-based interventions" OR "weather-health intervention" OR "weather-health interventions" OR "heat wave warning" OR "heat wave warnings" OR "temperature alert" OR "temperature alerts" OR "heathealth warning" OR "heathealth warnings" OR "thermal warning" OR "thermal warnings" OR "hot weather warning" OR "hot weather warnings") AND ("temperature-mortality" OR "temperature-morbidity" OR "heat-health" OR "thermal stress" OR hyperthermia OR "heat-related illness" OR "heat stroke" OR "heat exhaustion" OR "heat-related death" OR "heat-related deaths" OR "excess mortality" OR "heat-attributable death" OR "heat-attributable deaths" OR "temperature-related mortality" OR "thermal mortality" OR "hot weather mortality" OR "heat burden" OR "heat impact" OR "heat impacts") AND (("randomized controlled trial" OR "randomized controlled trials" OR "quasi-experimental" OR "natural experiment" OR "natural experiments" OR "regression discontinuity" OR "difference-in-difference" OR "difference-in-differences" OR "instrumental variable" OR "instrumental variables" OR "propensity score" OR matching OR "causal inference" OR "impact evaluation" OR "program evaluation" OR "programme evaluation" OR "intervention study" OR "intervention studies" OR "treatment effect" OR "treatment effects" OR "exogenous variation" OR "policy experiment" OR "policy experiments" OR "field experiment" OR "field experiments" OR "controlled before-after" OR "interrupted time series") OR ("before and after" OR "pre-post" OR "policy evaluation" OR "effectiveness study" OR "effectiveness studies" OR "outcome evaluation" OR "comparative study" OR "comparative studies" OR "cohort study" OR "cohort studies" OR "longitudinal study" OR "longitudinal studies"))
